anchored_threads.explanation: 2.52 sits in the karma-yoga thread but bridges toward the sthita-prajña thread. The verse names a specific stage in buddhi-yoga maturation (thicket-crossing produces nirveda); the engineering analog operationalizes this as the senior's settled response to architecture-meme proposals. The chapter brief warns against turning karma-yoga verses into productivity advice — 2.52's analog passes by holding the natural-not-cynical character of nirveda.

ordering: 2.52 follows 2.51 (destination padam anāmayam) and precedes 2.53 (closing condition for attaining yoga). The structural arc 2.49-2.53 is: ranking → mechanism → destination → cognitive-maturation-stage → closing condition. 2.52 contributes the cognitive-maturation-stage; the architecture-meme vignette correctly anchors on the temporal-scope (already-heard / yet-to-be-heard) which sits at the stage just before the closing condition.
verdict_reason: Supports chapter thesis on the karma-yoga thread while foreshadowing the sthita-prajña thread. Pass.
